case_title: BUNDY CHANOCK VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANOCK, BUNDY SERVED MAY-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KORTTING PHD, MARK G
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARK G. KOETTING, PH.D

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-16-2013. CASE IS DISMISSED. SHAWN TILLIS APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DONALD MARGOLIS APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. GEOFFREY GORDON-CREED APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CHRISTINE LEBLANC. MR. TILLIS REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF HAD PASSED AWAY SINCE OCTOBER 2012. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
